summary: ClawMe Phase 2 comprehensive testing completed. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages verified via Playwright - Landing, Login, Dashboard, Settings, Public Profile, and 404 pages all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Mock mode working correctly - all authenticated endpoints return mock-user-dev
In-memory store resets on server restart (expected for mock mode)
Handle validation regex allows 3-30 chars alphanumeric with underscores
Supabase/GitHub OAuth are MOCKED via placeholder credentials - real auth not functional
seed_data_creation: Mock user @mockuser with gateway wss://my-agent.example.com/ws, display name 'Test User', methods GET_AVAILABILITY and SEND_MESSAGE
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested. Backend uses Next.js API routes in /app/frontend/src/app/api/. Mock mode auto-authenticates as mock-user-dev. Handle @mockuser exists with gateway configured. Waitlist has multiple test entries. All CRUD operations for handles, heartbeat, resolve, and connections working. GitHub OAuth button present but uses placeholder credentials (MOCKED).

features_tested.landing_page: ✓ Nav, Hero, Waitlist form with handle availability check
features_tested.waitlist_api: ✓ POST create, GET check availability, GET count, duplicate detection
features_tested.login_page: ✓ GitHub OAuth button, ClawMe branding, terms text
features_tested.dashboard: ✓ Handle card, Agent status, Connections, Visibility cards, Sidebar
features_tested.settings: ✓ Handle settings, Agent settings, Visibility tiers, Danger zone
features_tested.public_profile: ✓ @handle display, verified badge, methods, Request Connection button
features_tested.handle_api: ✓ POST claim, PUT update (display_name, description, methods), GET me
features_tested.resolve_api: ✓ GET A2A card format, @ prefix handling, 404 for unknown
features_tested.connections_api: ✓ POST request, GET pending, target validation
